response.overview: Nina Hartley, Angel Kelly, Jeannie Pepper and Jerry Butler star in Fred Lincoln's interracial feautre In and Out of Africa. Nina Hartley plays a stuck up Baroness who is absconded by an African Queen looking for a little variety in her love life. Jerry Butler is her guide who while searching for the Baroness has his own share of interracial trysts with the local native girls.
response.title: In And Out Of Africa
